sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109355" key="u(potexna/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποτεχνάομαι</orth>, <sense id="n109355.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">come to aid by art,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:1:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
